title: Model & Effort Selector with Fast Mode Toggle

findings.description: Model selector exists in two places: (1) status bar bottom-left with dropdown picker supporting keyboard number shortcuts, (2) chat input area showing current model 'Sonnet 4.6'
findings.evidence: ModelSegment.tsx: dropdown with AVAILABLE_MODELS, number key fast-switching. Snapshot: button 'Sonnet 4.6' [ref=e6] in status bar, button 'Sonnet 4.6' [ref=e125] near chat input

findings.description: No 'Fast Mode' toggle found anywhere in the chat interface. The effort selector (Low/Medium/High/Max) exists but is buried in Settings, not accessible from chat compose view.
findings.evidence: No grep matches for 'fast mode' or 'fast.*toggle'. EffortSelector only used in settings/ModelTab and agent-builder/ModelTab

findings.description: Mode tabs (Chat/Code/Cowork) are visible in the header banner area, providing different interaction modes
